prompt: A digital anime-style illustration of a beautiful young woman, full-body portrait, standing confidently with one hand on her head, looking directly at the viewer with a gentle smile. She has long silver hair with subtle blue highlights, large purple eyes, and delicate features. She wears a futuristic tight-fitting sleeveless top in deep violet with glowing energy lines, a high-waisted short skirt with shimmering details, and transparent thigh-high stockings. Her outfit includes a small holographic wrist device and a sleek cybernetic helmet accessory. The background is a soft gradient of cosmic purple and pink, with floating stars and faint nebulae, creating a dreamy sci-fi atmosphere. Ultra-detailed, 4K resolution, vibrant colors, clean lines, sharp focus on the character, cinematic lighting, professional anime art style, highly detailed facial expression, elegant pose, dynamic yet serene.
